Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7602 "PHANTOMOFTHEASTEROID-06C8-7602" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $06c8 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Phantom of the Asteroid (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $06C8 which copies 256 bytes of data from $06E8 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $7602 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the stack).
